content.full_text:
December 10, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

I am the Treasurer for a city Council Candidate and a ballot initiative committee. I have the following questions:

What are the candidates options for use of left-over campaign funds? Please include whether or not he can save these for his next campaign or give them to a non-profit organization which is succeeding the initiative committee.

My question in relation to the ballot initiative committee is that since it ceased functioning as a committee to influence an election on election day and is now contemplating becoming a non-profit volunteer civic organization, would the date of the election be the committee's ending date for purposes of filing a termination report?

Is there anything in writing you could send me re these issues that reflect the latest court cases?

Thank you for your help and consideration.

Sincerely,

Joan R. Mihay
785 Cabrillo Place
Morro Bay, CA 93442
805-772-5225
